task_completion.description: Agent navigated to San Francisco, California
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Google Earth viewport displays the geography of San Francisco (e.g., downtown skyline, Transamerica Pyramid, or Golden Gate Bridge).

task_completion.description: Required layers '3D Buildings' and 'Roads' are enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Layers' sidebar panel, the checkboxes next to '3D Buildings' and 'Roads' are checked/active.

task_completion.description: Unwanted layers 'Borders and Labels' and 'Places' are disabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Layers' sidebar panel, the checkboxes next to 'Borders and Labels' and 'Places' are unchecked/empty.

task_completion.description: View is tilted to show 3D building heights
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewport shows a tilted perspective where the vertical height of 3D buildings is visible, rather than a flat top-down 2D map view.

task_completion.description: Screenshot saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog is visible with the filename 'sf_infrastructure.png' targeting '~/Documents', or a file explorer window shows the newly created file.

integrity.description: Agent used the Google Earth Pro GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The Google Earth Pro application window, including the sidebar and toolbar, is clearly visible and active.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to generate the image
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing commands to download images or generate screenshots programmatically without the app.

integrity.description: Layer settings were modified via the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Layers' panel in the sidebar is expanded and visible, indicating interaction with the settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location is San Francisco, California. Required enabled layers are '3D Buildings' and 'Roads'. Required disabled layers are 'Borders and Labels' and 'Places'.
